# mcp

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/mcp"
```

Package mcp implements a Model Context Protocol \(MCP\) server that exposes all SolarSage astrology tools. It communicates via JSON\-RPC over stdin/stdout, providing 40 tools for AI assistants like Claude Desktop.
